title: Discovery Day

contentHtml:
For Children in Rising 1st Grade
Sunday, June 28

Children in rising 1st grade can spend one amazing day at Camp Barney Medintz this summer! There will be tons of fun packed into one full day, as these young campers get a taste of the magic of camp with exciting activities that make up a typical day at Camp Barney Medintz, plus lunch in the dining hall! This is a great way to experience the feel of overnight camp.

Bus transportation will be provided. Campers will depart the Marcus JCC of Atlanta at 8:30 am and return at 5:00 pm.

Having consistency over multiple summers helps foster a sense of comfort and belonging, builds a connection to the people and places that make up camp, and creates lasting friendships. Camp also helps guide your child in their social, emotional, and recreational growth. These experiences have a positive impact that lasts for many years to come.
contentText:
